en_title: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered Nintendo Switch 2 Physical Edition Includes a Proper Cartridge, Bethesda Confirms Alongside Release Date and Technical Specs
cn_title: 《任天堂》《B社/贝塞斯达》《Nintendo Switch 2》《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》8月11日登陆Switch 2，实体卡带完整
subtitle: 这下要灾难了
opus_summary: B社确认《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》Switch 2实体版将含完整卡带及DLC，8月11日发售。掌机900p/30fps，底座1080p/30fps，支持DLSS。但发售日预告实机画面卡顿，遭玩家吐槽。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda will launch The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered for Nintendo Switch 2 on August 11, digitally via the eShop and in a physical edition that includes the full base game on a cartridge.
paragraphs.cn: B社将于8月11日在Nintendo Switch 2上推出《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》，通过eShop提供数字版，同时推出实体版，卡带内包含完整的游戏本体。

paragraphs.en: Boxed copies will include a proper cartridge (not a Game-Key Card) which also grants access to the Shivering Isles and Knights of the Nine story expansions (Bethesda is less clear about whether these are also on the card) and additional content you'll have to download. Still, this isn't a GTA 6 situation, with only a code in the game's box .
paragraphs.cn: 盒装版本会附带一张真正的卡带（不是Game-Key Card），其中还包含《战栗孤岛》和《九骑士》故事扩展（B社并未明确表示这些内容是否也收录在卡带内），以及需要额外下载的内容。不过，这至少不像GTA6那样盒子里只有一个下载码。

paragraphs.en: This includes the Fighter's Stronghold, Spell Tomes, Vile Lair, Mehrune's Razor, The Thieves Den, Wizard's Tower, The Orrery and the infamous Horse Armor Pack DLC. Finally, you'll get a code that grants access to Akatosh and Mehruns Dagon armors, weapons and horse armor sets.
paragraphs.cn: 这其中包括战士要塞、法术书、邪恶巢穴、梅鲁涅斯的剃刀、盗贼巢穴、巫师塔、星象仪，以及臭名昭著的马甲包DLC。最后，你还会获得一个兑换码，可解锁阿卡托什和梅鲁涅斯·大衮的盔甲、武器和马甲套装。

paragraphs.en: While that all sounds fine, fans have raised eyebrows at today's The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Nintendo Switch 2 release date trailer, below, which is largely a two-minute live-action skit featuring the game's notorious Adoring Fan character. Around 20 seconds of actual in-game footage are shown towards the end, which viewers have variously described as "choppy" and "rough."
paragraphs.cn: 虽然这些听起来都不错，但粉丝们对今天发布的《上古卷轴4：湮灭》Nintendo Switch 2发售日预告片纷纷侧目。这支近两分钟的真人短剧主角正是游戏里那个声名狼藉的崇拜者角色，直到结尾才展示了大约20秒的实际游戏画面，观众们普遍用「卡顿」和「粗糙」来形容。

paragraphs.en: "This runs like nuclear ass on my 13700k/5090 rig, and on PS5/XSX as well," noted one poster on video game forum ResetEra . "This is going to be a disaster..."
paragraphs.cn: ResetEra论坛上的一位用户写道：「这游戏在我13700k和5090的配置上跑得像屎一样，在PS5和XBOX Series上也是如此。这绝对会是一场灾难……」

paragraphs.en: "On one hand, Fallout 4 was rough on Switch 2 at first too, but I think I remember hearing its issues got ironed out in the end," countered another fan. "On the other hand, this is Oblivion Remastered, a game that makes my RTX 4080 cry."
paragraphs.cn: 另一位粉丝反驳道：「一方面，《辐射4》最初在Switch 2上表现也不理想，但我记得后来问题都得到了解决。另一方面，这可是《湮灭复刻版》，一款让我的RTX 4080都吃不消的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: In a press release sent to IGN, Bethesda confirmed that the Switch 2 version of The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered is designed to run with DLSS support on both handheld and docked mode at 900p 30fps on handheld and 1080p 30fps while docked.
paragraphs.cn: 在发给IGN的新闻稿中，B社确认，《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》Switch 2版将支持DLSS，掌机模式下以900p 30fps运行，底座模式下则达到1080p 30fps。

paragraphs.en: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered originally launched for PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S back in April 2025. "Oblivion Remastered is a fantastic modernization of an iconic open-world RPG, even if it maintains some of the jank and rough edges of the original, we wrote in IGN's The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered review , which returned an 8/10. Physical and digital pre-orders for the Nintendo Switch 2 version are now available.
paragraphs.cn: 《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》最初于2025年4月登陆PC、PS5和XBOX Series。IGN在评测中写道：「《湮灭 复刻版》是对这部标志性开放世界角色扮演游戏的一次出色现代化改造，尽管它保留了原作的一些生硬和粗糙之处」，并打出8/10分。Switch 2版的实体和数字预购现已开放。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
